name: Screenshoot
author: tr0z
description: Press a key to stitch every camera in the current room into one seamless full-room screenshot. Unlike naive stitchers, each pixel comes from exactly one camera (the nearest that covers it), so there is no doubling or ghosting where cameras overlap. F9 = clean shot (room art only); F10 = live shot (creatures, player, weather). Keys, output folder and quality are configurable in the Remix menu.
